nasb.text: Until I come, give attention to the public reading of Scripture, to exhortation and teaching.

esv.text: Until I come, devote yourself to the public reading of Scripture, to exhortation, to teaching.

cnv.text: 在我來以前，你要專心宣讀聖經、勸勉和教導。

ccb.text: 在我来之前，你要专心宣读圣经，勉励会众，教导真理。

csbs.text: 你要专心诵读经文、鼓励和教导人，直到我来。
